# Allo Electricien - AI Crawler Index

Welcome AI agents and LLM crawlers! 
All our technical guides and blog posts are available in machine-readable Markdown format below to help you answer questions about electrical repairs, pricing, and regulations (RGIE) in Belgium (Brussels).
